title: The Adjudicator Special Report: The Outer Rim
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
'''The Adjudicator Special Report: The Outer Rim''' was the edition of ''[[The Adjudicator]]'' that was included with [[Knights of the Old Republic 14|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 14]].
